hero.title: I build clear and bold digital experiences.
hero.subtitle: I design and develop products that solve real problems, with focus on performance, accessibility, and polished aesthetics.
hero.cardDescription: Looking for roles where I can contribute to mobile development and application architecture.

about.title: About me
about.description:
I'm a mobile developer with experience in Flutter and native Android. I focus on creating apps that not only work well but also feel good — responsive interfaces, smooth transitions, and data that displays when the user needs it.

My strength lies at the intersection of business logic and user experience. I don't settle for 'it works', I aim for 'it works in a way that makes sense'.

contact.title: Let's talk?
contact.description: Tell me about your project, role or idea. I respond within 24h.
preferences: Focus on continuous shipping and shared ownership.
